CRANK_TYPE_001 — memory-field-unknown.

A `turn/3` clause references a memory field not declared in the memory
struct's defstruct. Caught by Crank.Typing's compile-time hook when
:memory is set via `use Crank, memory: SomeStruct`.

Exercised by:
- test/crank/typing_test.exs — assertions on field-name validation.
- test/support/typing_fixtures.ex — fixtures that compile with bad fields.
